title: Fit Theorem Website
description: A high-performance web platform offering personalized workout routines, nutrition plans, and goal tracking tools to help real people achieve real fitness results.

title: Fit Theorem Android App
description: A sleek, feature-rich Android companion app featuring real-time training analytics, class booking, and virtual health coaching integrated into the mobile environment.

title: Fit Theorem iOS App
description: A premium iOS training application optimized for Apple devices, syncs with Apple HealthKit, and supports custom workouts and interactive nutrition logging.

title: Prothom Alo English
description: The official online English news portal for Bangladesh's leading newspaper, engineered for lightning-fast page loading and optimized reading layouts.

title: Prothom Alo Android App
description: A lightweight news feed Android app providing breaking news alerts, push notifications, offline bookmarking, and local language optimization.

title: SrilankanMatrimony Website
description: A secure, trusted online matchmaking site for Sri Lankans worldwide, utilizing complex compatibility filtering algorithms and advanced privacy features.

title: SrilankanMatrimony Android App
description: The Android application for the premier matchmaking service, featuring interactive user chat, swipe matchmaking, and robust photo verification options.

title: Munich Travel Android App
description: An offline-first travel companion guide app featuring interactive maps, public transit routes, local recommendation engines, and city guides.

title: Munich Travel iOS App
description: The iOS city directory guide, utilizing CoreLocation for localized recommendations, offline map caching, and curated restaurant lists.
